factors.name: mask_taper
factors.range_provenance: Model-sensitivity range assembled from wrapper defaults and earlier simulations; no fab calibration.
factors.reason: Implemented control; qualify its model-space range before screening.

factors.coupling_note: Cycle count changes cumulative etch, polymer deposition, polymer removal, and random-stream length. Use a matched-total-dose block or predeclare its cumulative-dose interactions before screening.
factors.name: num_cycles
factors.range_provenance: Model-sensitivity range assembled from wrapper defaults and earlier simulations; no fab calibration.
factors.reason: Implemented control; qualify its model-space range before screening.

factors.reason: Implemented control; qualify its model-space range before screening.

factors.coupling_note: The wrapper uses this value for polymer deposition and an equal-magnitude directional polymer-removal rate.

factors.reason: Implemented control; qualify its model-space range before screening.

factors.reason: Implemented control; qualify its model-space range before screening.

factors.coupling_note: The wrapper uses this directionality value for silicon-ion transport and directional polymer removal.

factors.reason: Implemented control; qualify its model-space range before screening.

factors.name: theta_r_min

factors.reason: Implemented control; qualify its model-space range before screening.

factors.name: pattern radius input
factors.range_provenance: Saved model-space sensitivity values from config/process.toml; range requalification required.
factors.reason: Implemented control; qualify its model-space range before screening.

factors.coupling_note: Mask survival also depends on cumulative ion exposure. Bridge the erosion block to low and high main-screen exposure.
factors.name: pattern mask height input
factors.range_provenance: Wrapper default only; range requalification required before a mask-erosion study.
factors.reason: Study mask height and erosion together before crossing them into the main etch screen.

factors.name: pattern grid delta
factors.range_provenance: Numerical-convergence ladder; not a recipe range.
factors.reason: Computational setting; qualify speed and measurement agreement separately.

factors.name: pattern x extent
factors.range_provenance: Wrapper default only.
factors.reason: Computational setting; qualify speed and measurement agreement separately.

factors.name: pattern y extent
factors.range_provenance: Numerical domain-convergence experiment.
factors.reason: Computational setting; qualify speed and measurement agreement separately.

factors.name: pattern hole depth
factors.range_provenance: Fixed by the intended pattern-before-etch sequence.
factors.reason: Keep fixed in the first block; changing it would define a different geometry or process path.

factors.name: pattern hole taper
factors.range_provenance: API-bounded sensitivity screen; no physical lithography mapping.
factors.reason: Available concept or API input is not implemented in the active wrapper.

factors.name: pattern hole shape
factors.range_provenance: Structural guard exercised by test_copper_suppression_fill.py; it is not an interpolated recipe range.
factors.reason: Use FULL 2D geometry for this mask/Bosch block so both sidewalls and the floor remain visible. Treat dimensionality as a separate challenge.

factors.name: pattern substrate material
factors.range_provenance: Declared TSV silicon substrate.
factors.reason: Keep fixed in the first block; changing it would define a different geometry or process path.

factors.name: pattern mask material
factors.range_provenance: Structural choice awaiting hard-mask versus stripped-resist decision.
factors.reason: Keep fixed in the first block; changing it would define a different geometry or process path.

known_interactions: strip choice x CMP stop identity
factors.name: pattern mask strip
factors.range_provenance: Required by the temporary-photoresist interpretation; alternative hard-mask stack remains a controlled structural arm.
factors.reason: Keep fixed in the first block; changing it would define a different geometry or process path.

factors.name: bosch polymer deposition duration
factors.range_provenance: Fixed implementation value, not a qualified range.
factors.reason: Fix duration to 1.0 as the deposition-rate scale convention. In this single phase, rate and duration enter as one commanded dose.

factors.name: bosch polymer removal duration
factors.range_provenance: Fixed implementation value, not a qualified range.
factors.reason: Fix duration to 1.0 as the removal-rate scale convention. Varying both rate and duration would duplicate one commanded dose.

factors.name: bosch polymer removal rate
factors.range_provenance: Derived coupling, not an independent range.
factors.reason: The wrapper ties removal magnitude to deposition_thickness. It cannot be estimated independently until an explicit removal-to-deposition ratio is wired.

factors.name: bosch polymer removal sticking
factors.range_provenance: Fixed implementation value, not a qualified range.
factors.reason: The wrapper fixes first-contact removal. Treat a different transport law as a separate model-family challenge.

known_interactions: deposition source exponent x aspect ratio
factors.name: bosch polymer deposition source exponent
factors.range_provenance: API input is visible but no wrapper range is defined.
factors.reason: Available concept or API input is not implemented in the active wrapper.

factors.name: bosch ion rate
factors.range_provenance: Saved model-sensitivity endpoints only; range requalification required.
factors.reason: Implemented control; qualify its model-space range before screening.

factors.coupling_note: Mask survival also depends on cumulative ion exposure. Bridge the erosion block to low and high main-screen exposure.
factors.name: bosch mask ion rate
factors.range_provenance: The qualified range currently establishes survival only. Stage 2f adaptively challenges -0.05, -0.06, and -0.08, but no coefficient value is a fab selectivity range without calibration.
factors.reason: Study mask height and erosion together before crossing them into the main etch screen.

factors.name: bosch rays per point
factors.range_provenance: Numerical-convergence range.
factors.reason: Computational setting; qualify speed and measurement agreement separately.

factors.name: bosch rng seed
factors.range_provenance: Reproducibility control; not a physical range.
factors.reason: Computational setting; qualify speed and measurement agreement separately.

factors.name: bosch on cycle
factors.range_provenance: Observation callback; excluded from DOE factors.
factors.reason: Checkpoint callback; records intermediate geometry but is not a process factor.

factors.name: bosch on polymer
factors.range_provenance: Observation callback; excluded from DOE factors.
factors.reason: Checkpoint callback; records intermediate geometry but is not a process factor.

known_interactions: Every process coefficient in the selected model
factors.name: hard mask retained versus resist stripped plus separate stop
factors.range_provenance: Structural challenge arms, not an interpolated numeric range.
factors.reason: Keep fixed in the first block; changing it would define a different geometry or process path.

known_interactions: Cannot be repaired by widening the existing coefficient range alone.
factors.name: missing lithography physics
factors.range_provenance: No range: this is a missing model capability or validation domain.
factors.reason: Missing physics is recorded as a limitation, not converted into a numeric factor.

scope: Complete mask/Bosch registry projection before range finding; not a design matrix.
screening_rule: The pair viewer may display two factors at once. The experiment may not drop an eligible factor because it was absent from an earlier campaign.
